title: gladiolus schweinfurthii
intro: Gladiolus schweinfurthii, also known as the Schweinfurth's gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family, characterized by its tall spikes of white or pink flowers with purple or yellow markings. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus schweinfurthii include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying the flowers and leaves, and then infusing them in hot water to make a tea or using them in tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
